prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Latoya who is applying to a design program. Mention creativity and iteration based feedback.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Design Program Name]
[Program Address]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Latoya for admission to the [Design Program Name] at [Program Institution]. As Latoya's [supervisor/mentor/teacher], I have had the pleasure of observing and guiding her growth as a designer over the past [X] years, and I can confidently attest to her exceptional creativity, dedication, and passion for design.

Latoya's creative approach to problem-solving is truly remarkable. She has a unique ability to think outside the box and bring innovative ideas to the table. Her designs are not only aesthetically pleasing but also functional and user-centered. She has a keen eye for detail and a deep understanding of the design process, which enables her to iterate and refine her ideas with ease.

One of Latoya's greatest strengths is her ability to receive and incorporate feedback. She is an exemplary student who thrives on constructive criticism and uses it as an opportunity to learn and grow. Her willingness to take risks and experiment with new ideas is inspiring, and her ability to iterate based on feedback is a testament to her dedication to excellence.

Throughout her time in our program, Latoya has consistently demonstrated a high level of creativity, technical skill, and collaboration. She has worked effectively with her peers to bring complex projects to life, and her contributions have been invaluable to our team. Her passion for design is contagious, and she has a natural ability to inspire and motivate those around her.

I have no doubt that Latoya would be an excellent fit for the [Design Program Name] at [Program Institution]. Her creativity, dedication, and passion for design make her an exceptional candidate, and I strongly believe that she would thrive in your program. I highly recommend her for admission and am confident that she will make valuable contributions to your community.

If you require any additional information, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide any further support or recommendations.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
